pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Corvus is a QEMU/KVM virtual machine management daemon with a CLI client. It provides VM lifecycle management, disk image operations, virtual networking via VDE, cloud-init integration, virtiofs shared directories, and template-based VM provisioning.
By default (USE=binary) this installs the prebuilt amd64 binaries plus the Python wheel from the upstream release. Disable the binary flag to compile from source instead, which pulls in GHC and a Cabal/Haskell toolchain. The live (9999) ebuild always builds from source and does not offer the binary flag.

use.flag: Install the prebuilt amd64 binaries and Python wheel from the upstream release instead of compiling from source (avoids the GHC/Haskell toolchain). Not available on the live (9999) ebuild.
Install the corvus-admin Python CLI for mTLS certificate management (mint, deploy, renew). Requires the python USE flag.
Install the corvus VM management daemon
Install the corvus-netd privileged networking agent
Install the corvus-nodeagent per-host privileged agent
Install bash shell completion for crv CLI
Install zsh shell completion for crv CLI
Install fish shell completion for crv CLI
Enable VDE virtual switch support for host-VM networking
Install the pure-Python corvus_client package (speaks Cap'n Proto RPC via dev-python/pycapnp). Installed into every enabled PYTHON_TARGETS site-packages.
Install the corvus-web HTTP/WebSocket gateway (FastAPI + uvicorn) and build the bundled React SPA. Requires Node.js + npm at build time and the python USE flag at runtime.
